feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP PI/PO Body filter the data in Message Mapping only
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to set conditional filtering data on the BODY in Message Mapping to send the data that meets the conditions to a third-party system.But once I've configured it, I'm testing to only map the first piece of data.

I didn't see any difference when I compared it with other interfaces. Is it possible that the other party's interface is causing it?Here's a screenshot of my configuration and testing.

Please support . Thanks.

entry.title: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content:
Hello,

          I am new to CPI, I was trying to test "Request Reply" step. It is throwing an error in "Processing" when I try to add "Step 2" I get an error "Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema." .

I don't have those many steps as in the below screen shot, I am trying to connect to Northwind using the ODATA adapter. I have filled in all mandatory details, I don't understand why it keeps giving me that error and what information is missing.

entry.title: How to skip damaged files in SAP PI file adapter?
entry.content: I have a requirement where in SAP PI file adapter sender communication channel, I need to skip certain files based on the content of the file. How do I do that?

entry.title: How to create Data type in ESR for a JSON structure in SAP PI?
entry.content:
Hi all

So this might be a very basic question but I am a complete noob in SAP PI right now. I have a requirement where I have a JSON structure like this:

{
"element_one" : "",
"element_two" :[
{
"a" :"",
"b":""
}
]
}

I need to create a data type in the ESR for this structure. What I am confused about is whether I just create it the same way as I do foe XML or JSON without array or does the presence of array requires some additional steps.

Thank you.

entry.title: Configure server nodes in PI system - impact
entry.content:
Hello,
We currently have 7 server nodes on our production PI, but one of them is disabled because it was causing a lot of problems. This is server 3. I would like to reduce the number of server nodes to 2 so that "server3" is removed, and then restore the number of server nodes to 7 to reset the configuration. 
I would like to ask what the impact will be if we first delete these server nodes and then restore them to their previous value
What data might be lost during this reconfiguration? What impact might this have?
 
What data may be lost during this reconfiguration? What impact might this have?
Kind regards,
Mateusz

entry.title: Querying Data From Salesforce to SAP BW/4HANA by SAP PI/PO as middleware ?
entry.content:
Hi there, I am new to SAP PI/PO. I want to know the steps to fetch the data from Salesforce to SAP BW/4HANA by SAP PI/PO as middleware. My case is that I have to pass a SOQL query to salesforce using rest API and the data that will come will need to be captured in SAP PI/PO, where I have to create a configuration such that the data I have to fetch from the API until I don't get all the records, because salesforce has a limitation of 2000 records to fetch at a time. Then we have to use the nextURL key from the response which gives us the URL for the next chunk of rows. until another field which is coming in response called done does not have its value as true. After The Data is gathered I have to send those data to the SAP BW/4HANA where these data will be stored in tables for which I have to do some ABAP developments.

=> In Short I need the detailed steps on how to perform this anyone who has done this earlier and knows the integration stated above will be helpful.

 

Thanks

entry.title: OData adapter is broken and does not work. Please address this issue as soon as possible.
entry.content:
The OData adapter does not seem to be working properly for several days now. Is anyone else experiencing this phenomenon?
I would like to get some help.

When I press step2, I get “Invalid or missing namespace for ‘Schema’.” is displayed.

Best regards

entry.title: How to achieve LAU AES256-GCM in SAP PI - SWIFT integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are upgrade Autoclient software 1.6.0 , which has LAU AES256-GCM, how to achieve this in SAP PI SWIFT integration. Where to configure this in PI Channel ? any jar files needs to import it in PI. Please suggest of any one implement this already.

Regards,

Mani

entry.title: Getting 400 while calling S4hana service from SAP CPI
entry.content:
"I am trying to integrate an S/4HANA system service into my CPI. Basically, I need to use two APIs: one for getting a CSRF token and another for making a POST request. When calling the first API, I need to pass x-csrf-token: Fetch in the header with a GET request. This should return an x-csrf-token in the response, which I will then use to call the second POST API.

The issue I’m facing is that when I call the first API, I receive the same header I sent to the server, rather than the expected x-csrf-token. In Postman, it correctly returns the x-csrf-token, but when I implement it in my code, the response returns with the same header value I sent, i.e., x-csrf-token: Fetch. I'm not sure why this is happening, and when I call the second API, it also returns a response like.

 

Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Bad Request : 400 : HTTP/1.1 . The MPL ID for the failed message is : XXXXXXXXXXXX
 
  After I check the open TEXT view I can see the Request url Request URI         = GET https:XXXXXXXX/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder/$metadata HTTP/1.1
 
but the actull url is in  postman I am useing post Url as https:XXXXXXXX/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder 
 
so I think it happen because of oData Adapter 

 

oData1 config :

this adapter return 200 ok there is no big problem also it have minor problem It response header is x-csrf-token : Fetch  but it should be some token value .

 

and oData adapter 2 config:

 

 

 

P;ease anyone help me what I did wrong in these steps , Also the same url working in post man 

 csrf-token url

 
 
Post url

 

Plz anyone help me to find out the reason Thanks in adavance 

 

@SAPSupport  @Sap  @SAPSUPPORT2  @DonWilliams  @N1kh1l   @Dan_Wroblewski @Ryan-Crosby  @Sandra_Rossi

entry.title: "GL account is not Defined in Chart of Accounts XXXX ” - Error while releasing Billing document
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The end user while releasing the billing document in VFX3  getting the error “ GL account is not Defined in Chart of Accounts XXXX ”. We have checked that all the GL accounts defined in the Account Determination of the Billing document are already existing in FS00 and correctly configured in VKOA. the Customer recon account and the Tax GL are also defined in FS00. We have checked the OSS note 1596752 as well but got no clue regarding the error message. Could you please let me know your views how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: SAP CPI ODATA V2 jaon data POST request Issue
entry.content:
There is a Odata API which is accept Json data in POST method it is working fine in postman ,

 

I have configured in sap cpi useing Odata v2 Adapter and I am sending same json data I am getting below error 

Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Request Payload Parsing Failed for one of the reason: (1) Either the OData metadata content available in the server is outdated OR (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details : only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1) , org.xmlpull.v1.XmlPullParserException: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1) . The MPL ID for the failed message is : AGaseh9b_O_8thxj4XfM0q6Gl8Zl   
 
Plz anyone help me to find out it ,Thanks in advance
@SAPSupport  @sana_faraz

entry.title: Inbound and outbound service for Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition. An integration between POKA and SAP is necessary for us.

We have been using the "Maintenance Notification" Inbound API lately to prove the payload from POKA and create the notification on SAP. The notification has been successfully created in SAP.

1. By returning the notification number to POKA, we must receive an acknowledgement of the notification that was made on SAP. Hope it will be a outbound service (We are not sure).

2. In addition, whenever there is a change in the notification status, it must also be reflected on the POKA.

Would you kindly recommend

Is it possible to utilize the same "Maintenance Notification" API for acknowledgment?and the status changes to be sent back to POKA ?

Could you please suggest us a Outbound API for this purpose. 

Is it possible to utilize the same API for Inbound and outbound services?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP Process Integration 

Regards,

Yaswanth.

entry.title: Execute SQL statement on SAP PO and then export CSV file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on SAP PO single stack 7.5 and we have extracted message count for SAP PO 7.5 using Message overview. I got to know that there is another way, would allow even better analysis by also considering message size. Could you please help me to know on how to execute SQL statement on SAP PO 7.5 single stack? What level of access is needed to do so? what tools/softwares to be installed to do that? Should we take help from Basis team who has SAP PO server level access?

CREATE TABLE Z_BC_MSG AS (SELECT MSG_ID,DIRECTION,TO_PARTY_NAME,TO_PARTY_TYPE,FROM_PARTY_NAME,FROM_PARTY_TYPE,TO_SERVICE_NAME,TO_SERVICE_TYPE,FROM_SERVICE_NAME,FROM_SERVICE_TYPE,BYTES_LENGTH,RECV_ACTION_NAME,RECV_ACTION_TYPE,SCENARIO_ID FROM BC_MSG)

and then we need to export Z_BC_MSG as CSV file?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: "How to Correctly Convert JSON to XML for OData v2 Adapter in SAP CPI for S/4HANA SaleOrder API Req"
entry.content:
I am working on an integration scenario in SAP CPI where I need to call the S/4HANA System A_SalesOrder API. The API works perfectly fine with JSON payload when tested in Postman. However, when implementing this integration using the OData v2 adapter in CPI with the same JSON request payload, I encounter the following error:

"An internal server error occurred: Request Payload Parsing Failed. Possible reasons include: (1) The OData metadata content available on the server might be outdated, or (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1), org.xmlpull.v1.XmlPullParserException: only whitespace content allowed before start tag and not { (position: START_DOCUMENT seen {... @1:1)."

In an attempt to resolve this, I converted the JSON payload to XML and sent it, but now I receive a different error:

"An internal server error occurred: Request Payload Parsing Failed. Possible reasons include: (1) The OData metadata content available on the server might be outdated, or (2) The request payload seems to be incorrect. Error Details: Parsing exception for XML node <Material>, com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: The XML is malformed at node <Material>."

I have found a blog that discusses converting JSON to XML for this purpose: Posting Sales Orders into S/4HANA Cloud API - Part 2. However, I am unsure about the exact XML structure needed. Can someone provide detailed guidance on how to correctly convert JSON to XML for this scenario and ensure it meets the requirements of the OData v2 adapter?

 

when I tried from postman it is working 

but I tried from cpi useing json getting error

req payload :

{
    "SalesOrderType": "OR",
    "SalesOrganization": "MBSO",
    "DistributionChannel": "MC",
    "OrganizationDivision": "MD",
    "SoldToParty": "3200000043",
    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "alk",
    "TransactionCurrency": "INR",
    "to_Item": {
        "results": [
            {
                "SalesOrderItem": "10",
                "Material": "81",
                "RequestedQuantity": "10",
                "ProductionPlant": "MBP1",
                "to_ScheduleLine": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ScheduleLine": "1",
                            "ScheduleLineOrderQuantity": "10"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                "to_PricingElement": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ConditionType": "PRMB",
                            "ConditionCurrency": "INR",
                            "ConditionQuantity": "10",
                            "ConditionRateValue": "150.0000"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    },
    "to_Partner": {
        "results": [
            {
                "PartnerFunction": "SP",
                "Customer": "3200000006"
            },
            {
                "PartnerFunction": "BP",
                "Customer": "3200000006"
            }
        ]
    }
}
 
error:

 

so I have converted to xml still getting some error like :

 

so I found one blog this one :#https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/posting-sales-orders-into-s-4hana-cloud-api-part-2/ba-p/13353053

so in this blog I found request xml mapping like this 

I changed the xml structure accrodingly so my structure look like this 

<A_SalesOrder>
    <A_SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrderType>OR</SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrganization>MBSO</SalesOrganization>
        <DistributionChannel>MC</DistributionChannel>
        <OrganizationDivision>MD</OrganizationDivision>
        <SoldToParty>3200000043</SoldToParty>
        <PurchaseOrderByCustomer>AleranT</PurchaseOrderByCustomer>
        <TransactionCurrency>INR</TransactionCurrency>
        <to_Item>
            <A_SalesOrderItemType>
                <SalesOrderItem>10</SalesOrderItem>
                <Material>81</Material>
                <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                <ProductionPlant>MBP1</ProductionPlant>
                <to_ScheduleLine>
                    <results>
                        <ScheduleLine>1</ScheduleLine>
                        <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                    </results>
                </to_ScheduleLine>
                <to_PricingElement>
                    <results>
                        <ConditionType>PRMB</ConditionType>
                        <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue>
                    </results>
                </to_PricingElement>
            </A_SalesOrderItemType>
        </to_Item>
        <to_Partner>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>SP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>BP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
        </to_Partner>
    </A_SalesOrderType>
</A_SalesOrder>
 
but still getting node parsing error because of some field like 
  <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue> 
but in that blog I cant see the proper xml fieldname for this three so I simple removed and tried. so my structure look like this 
 
<A_SalesOrder>
    <A_SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrderType>OR</SalesOrderType>
        <SalesOrganization>MBSO</SalesOrganization>
        <DistributionChannel>MC</DistributionChannel>
        <OrganizationDivision>MD</OrganizationDivision>
        <SoldToParty>3200000043</SoldToParty>
        <PurchaseOrderByCustomer>AleranT</PurchaseOrderByCustomer>
        <TransactionCurrency>INR</TransactionCurrency>
        <to_Item>
            <A_SalesOrderItemType>
                <SalesOrderItem>10</SalesOrderItem>
                <Material>81</Material>
                <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                <ProductionPlant>MBP1</ProductionPlant>
                <to_ScheduleLine>
                    <results>
                        <ScheduleLine>1</ScheduleLine>
                        <RequestedQuantity>10</RequestedQuantity>
                    </results>
                </to_ScheduleLine>
                <to_PricingElement>
                    <results>
                        <ConditionType>PRMB</ConditionType>
                       
                    </results>
                </to_PricingElement>
            </A_SalesOrderItemType>
        </to_Item>
        <to_Partner>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>SP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
            <results>
                <PartnerFunction>BP</PartnerFunction>
                <Customer>3200000006</Customer>
            </results>
        </to_Partner>
    </A_SalesOrderType>
</A_SalesOrder>  
 
 
so useing this structure to I can able to create sale order Sucessfully but still I need those three fields   <ConditionCurrency>INR</ConditionCurrency>
                        <ConditionQuantity>10</ConditionQuantity>
                        <ConditionRateValue>150.0000</ConditionRateValue>
 
so how to find out the proper xml request format   plz anyone help me to find out this Thank you
 
@SAPSupport @MartyMcCormick  @Chr_Vogler  @pascalrenet   @Ryan-Crosby

entry.title: PI7.5 can be Installabled operating system versions?SUSE15?
entry.content: The current PI7.50 is installed on SUSE11 SP4. Since it is an older version, can it be migrated to SUSE15?

entry.title: SAP PO inboundRA configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP guys .

I have one simple question , e.g an ERP system wants to send IDOC to SAP PO and we have requirement to configure inboundRA connection , so there are 3 different clients on ERP so do we need to configure 3 cloned RA for that or one inboundRA ADAPTER will work ?  Please help to clarify 

Regards

Ashish Goswami

entry.title: kate AMQP channel in error in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have sender 3rd party Kate AMQP sender channel polling in error in SAP PO like shown below.

Could you please recommend the corrective actions to resolve the issue?

Error code:

no connection to broker check start/stop logs, last known error:error during establishing connection to AMQP server with channel:AMQP_XXXXXX, error :readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class org.apache.qpid.jms.provider.exceptions.ProviderIOException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class io.netty.channel.unix.Errors$NativeIoException)| |

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Client Proxy - WS SOAP with different namespace for QAS & PRD
entry.content:
Hello to all!

I'm facing the following issue:

I'm consuming a WS SOAP using Client Proxy. This solution is in PRD System already.
The Web Service provider will change the namespace of the WS and will have a different one for QAS and PRD system.

What are the best aproach to solve this:

1. How can I change the namespace of an existing proxy?
Do I have to create it again from scratch?

2. Since the namespace in the Client Proxy is created in DEV System and cannot be change in QAS and PRD system, how is the best way to handle this?
Do I need to have two different Client Proxy and use one or another depending the system?

 

Thanks, Pablo

entry.title: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario: Proxy(SOAP) -JDBC(PostgreSQL)

When we are sending the data from SAP ==>SAP PO==> JDBC (PostgreSQL) but its failing in PO

Getting an error as below.

Unable to execute statement for table or stored procedure. ‘Offices’ (Structure ’Statement’) due to org.postgresql.util.PSQLException:ERROR: relation “offices” does not exist

Position: 8

So can you please help us how to send data to PostgreSQL from SAP PO?

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.title: File stored in Ready Folder is not processing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an issue with LDAP authentication in MDM 7.1 initiation (.INI) File.

Log Detail
Log-on failure: LDAP Error, userName = Admin User not found

We are trying to replace the existing system ID with a different user.

1. Do we need to encrypt the password in the initiation file, Can We set-up the password attribute directly (without encryption).

2. What encryption method is being used between MDM7.1 and LDAP?

Thanks
